Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Workload

A structure to represent a workload

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
FinishedAssignments

The number of assignments finished by this person.

 integer

None.
TotalAvailableAssignments

The number of assignments available to this person.

 integer

None.
FinishedWorkload

The number of workload minutes finished by this person.

 integer

None.
TotalAvailableWorkload

The number of workload minutes available to this person.

 integer

None.
